Object navigation

Move to the center of the open hall and wait for instructions.
Go to the nearest desk and stop in front of it.
Navigate to the middle desk and stop facing it.
Reach the area marked by the yellow and black tape on the floor and stop at its edge.
Go to the fire extinguisher and stop right in front of it.
Move to the column and stop next to it.

Vision-language navigation (multi-step)

Cross the open hall in a straight line until you reach the far wall, then stop.
Move toward the row of desks on your right and position yourself parallel to them.
Go to the leftmost desk, then turn and face the open space.
Drive along the wall on your right until you reach the desks, then stop.
Navigate to the corner where the desks meet the wall and stop there.
Approach the taped-off zone on the floor and stop just outside it, without entering.
Go to the center of the hall, turn around, and face the desks.
Pass between the desks and the open area, then stop at the far end of the desks.
Explore the open hall, then move toward the rightmost desk and stop in front of it.
